title: As Israel Loses Support in the U.S., Rahm Emanuel Criticizes Netanyahu
summary_full: The former Chicago mayor, a Democrat exploring a 2028 presidential run, is in Tel Aviv calling for an end to unconditional U.S. support of Israel.
summary_public: The former Chicago mayor, a Democrat exploring a 2028 presidential run, is in Tel Aviv calling for an end to unconditional U.S. support of Israel.

IL.label: neutral
